Comment_glosser: a clipping of ‘half third times twenty’, where ‘half third’ is understood as 2½, i.e., ‘half less than three’
a clipping of ‘half fourth times twenty’, where ‘half fourth’ is understood as 3½, i.e., ‘half less than four’
a clipping of ‘half fifth times twenty’, where ‘half fifth’ is understood as 4½, i.e., ‘half less than five’
